K M equals square root of left parenthesis 6 square root of 2 right parenthesis ² end root end root plus left parenthesis 6 right parenthesis ² space
space space space space space space equals square root of 72 plus 36 end root
space space space space space space equals square root of 108
space space space space space space equals 6 square root of 3
less than L equals 90 degree left parenthesis k a r e n a space s i k u space s i k u right parenthesis
